mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the unemployment rate signals stronger labor market conditions, increasing corporate profit visibility and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE declines by > 0.2pp over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in housing starts signals strong consumer demand, boosting corporate revenues and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where HOUST increases by > 5% over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: High inflation combined with low interest rates creates a 'stagflationary' environment where equity markets discount future cash flows at higher rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL > 250 and FEDFUNDS < 2.5.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production signals stronger manufacturing activity, improving corporate earnings and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where INDPRO increases by > 1% over 1 month.

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth signals robust economic expansion, increasing corporate profits and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 60% of instances where GDPC1 grows by > 1% over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: Monetary tightening cycles, indicated by rising federal funds rates, increase borrowing costs and reduce equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS increases by > 0.5% over 1 month.

mechanism_narrative: Strong employment growth combined with declining unemployment signals a tight labor market, increasing wage pressures and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where PAYEMS > 150k and UNRATE < 4.5%.
